description: Notes for a legal query or responsum. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Probably 12th or 13th century. Regarding Reuven who willed a house to his grandson. After 23 years, the other heirs challenged his title to the property. On verso there is also a line of accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals, mentioning ink (ḥibr), baṭāʾiq(?), ṭaḥīna, and either a pigeon (ḥamām) or a bath (ḥammām).
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
